text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm going to make some refreshments
before training starts. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... I wonder what Trainer would like.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, vegetables are cheap... But if I want to
cover all the nutritional bases, then I'll need some
meat too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Actually, while I'm at it, I should try cooking up a
new dish.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure there were a ton of cookbooks at
the bookstore in the mall.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I know! I should make something that'll keep for a
while. I'll grab a cookbook with tasty recipes that
can be frozen, and—

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Attention all shoppers! A limited-time sale on
meats will be starting soon! Act now before
they're sold out!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! I need to get some before they sell
out!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh... I'm sure it'll be fine if I'm only a tiny bit
late.
